Projects.Name: Amazon.Lambda.Core
ChangelogMessages: Add ILambdaSerializer Serializer property to ILambdaContext (default-implemented to null on net8.0+) so user code can access the serializer registered with the runtime

Projects.Name: Amazon.Lambda.RuntimeSupport
ChangelogMessages: Expose the registered ILambdaSerializer on HandlerWrapper.Serializer and propagate it to the per-invocation ILambdaContext.Serializer

Projects.Name: Amazon.Lambda.TestUtilities
ChangelogMessages: Add Serializer setter to TestLambdaContext to mirror the new ILambdaContext.Serializer property
